summary: Verification of Mostbet Kassa API integration completed. All 33 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified Admin panel correctly displays Mostbet Kassa section with API Key, Cashpoint ID, and live Kassa Balance (400,000 UZS). All navigation tabs working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mostbet Kassa integration verified working. GET /api/admin/kassa/balance returns {success: true, data: {balance: 400000, currency: UZS}}. GET /api/admin/settings returns mostbet_api_key (masked) and mostbet_cashpoint_id fields. Admin panel Settings tab shows Mostbet Kassa section with live balance display.

frontend_admin_panel.details: Mostbet Kassa section visible with API Key, Cashpoint ID, and Kassa Balance displaying 400,000 UZS

home_page.details: User balance displayed in both UZS (125,000) and USD (0)
